tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Comparative & Superlative Adjectives.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Ram is taller than Shyam. Ram is the tallest. This movie is better than that movie. This is the best movie. This book is more interesting than that one.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Comparative & Superlative Adjectives.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This is the most interesting book. He runs faster than me. He runs the fastest. Today's weather is worse than yesterday's. This is the worst weather this year.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "यह कार उससे महंगी है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This car is more expensive than that one.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "This are the best movie."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Comparative & Superlative Adjectives.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He is smaller than him. He is the smallest. This way is easier than that one. This is the easiest way.
